title: pow: STALENESS_WINDOW_SECS misleading; effective window is up to 659s not 600s
description: STALENESS_WINDOW_SECS = 600 but effective window is up to 659s due to floor rounding. A caller using this constant to bound token age gets 600 when enforcement allows 659. Either rename to STALENESS_WINDOW_MINUTES=10 or add a STALENESS_MAX_EFFECTIVE_SECS=659 for callers needing the true bound.
